claims.summary: The quality gate intentionally preserves exactly seven repeated symbols and rejects eight or more while accepting readable technical punctuation.
claims.disposition: Verify the exact seven/eight/nine-symbol and technical-expression regressions.

claims.summary: Artifact cleanup is a single raw-provenance pass and quoted or nested marker removal remains visible as semantic-integrity risk.
claims.disposition: Verify longest-match accounting, second-order preservation, quoted counts, and shadow-review diagnostics.

claims.summary: Dialogue history now fades gradually by recency across six or eight exchanges rather than using the historical binary compression.
claims.disposition: Verify current history limits, trim gradient, NEXT-line removal, and prompt-budget accounting.

claims.summary: Changing quality thresholds, artifact output, history packing, prompts, or provider budgets would alter live dialogue behavior.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait with output-shape and felt-pressure review.
